2355840.name: American Christmas 2
2355840.description:
💥Get ready to race, power up and laugh-out-loud in this fun and fast-paced 2-Player Platformer!💥

👥 That's right, 2 player couch co-op. 👥

HOW IT WORKS:

Choose your Christmas Kid and test your limits to see how many levels you can complete!

🎁 Unlimited levels, unlimited fun. 🎁

SPEED-RUN, JUMP, FLOAT, DASH, STOMP and SHOOT your way through enemies like the Toyless Present and Broken Ornament.

What thrilling power-ups will you discover?

In this Randomized Casual Platformer experience, you get a unique gaming experience every time you play!

Let's party!

💥Grab a friend and START YOUR ADVENTURE TODAY!💥

🪄The Magic has Returned!🪄

✨Features✨

-15 Playable Characters to choose from.
-Unlimited Randomized Levels.
-Easy Controls. (joy stick + 2 buttons)
-No Wifi Needed.
-2 Player Couch Co-op. (no setup required!)
2355840.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
